title: Pinterest Hits First $1B Revenue Quarter, MAUs Surge to 553M Record High
text: Pinterest achieved a historic milestone with its first $1 billion revenue quarter in Q4 2024. The company reported record 553 million monthly active users, representing an 11% year-over-year increase. Q4 2024 revenue jumped 18% year-over-year to $1.15 billion, beating analyst expectations of $1.14 billion. Adjusted EBITDA came in at $470.9 million versus the $444.8 million expected. The fourth-quarter adjusted EBITDA margin was 41%, exceeding Wall Street's projection of 39%. Full-year 2024 revenue was $3.65 billion with net income of $1.86 billion. The company's strategic focus on AI shopping, lower-funnel advertising, and user engagement drove strong profitability growth.
